events.summary: Goguryeo, Baekje, and Silla shaped early Korean state formation and culture.
Goryeo unified much of the peninsula and gave Korea its English name.
A long Confucian dynasty that shaped language, institutions, scholarship, and social norms.
Colonial rule deeply affected Korean politics, identity, economy, and historical memory.
South Korea was established after liberation and division of the peninsula.
Rapid industrialisation, democratisation, technology growth, and global cultural influence.
